news.t: Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?

holdings.infoBox: PWV is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are Citigroup stock at 3.66%, Wells Fargo & Company at 3.56%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 3.56%, Morgan Stanley at 3.56%, and Bank of America at 3.54%.

overview.description: The Invesco Large Cap Value ETF (PWV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks the Dynamic Large Cap Value Intellidex Index. The index selects its holdings using a 10-factor style isolation process and uses a tiered weighting scheme. PWV was launched on Mar 3, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Dynamic Large Cap Value Intellidex Index (AMEX)

data.title: Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?
data.text: While momentum, growth, and high-beta strategies have served as the engines driving quarter-to-date returns for factor ETFs, a subtle shift under the hood suggests a potential factor rotation may be u...
